info.title: Ecommerce
info.description: An API for managing an ecommerce platform, facilitating operations such as product listings, order processing, and user management.

post.description: This endpoint allows for the registration of a new user within the e-commerce platform.

500.description: Internal server error

example.message: Unable to process registration at this time

get.description: Fetches detailed information about the user identified by the given userId.

example.message: User with the specified ID does not exist

500.description: Internal server error

post.summary: Add an item to the cart
post.description: Adds a specified item to the cart for the user identified by userId.

requestBody.description: Details of the item to be added to the cart

200.description: Item successfully added to the cart

example.message: The specified user or product does not exist

500.description: Internal server error

example.message: Unable to add item to the cart

get.description: Retrieves the entire cart details for the user identified by userId.

example.message: The specified user or cart does not exist

500.description: Internal server error

delete.summary: Remove an item from the cart
delete.description: Deletes a specified product from the cart for the user identified by userId.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the product to be removed

200.description: Item successfully removed from the cart

404.description: User or product not found in cart

example.message: The specified user or product does not exist in the cart

500.description: Internal server error

example.message: Unable to remove item from the cart

put.description: Updates the quantities of items in the cart for the user identified by userId.

requestBody.description: Details of the items to be updated

example.message: The specified user or product does not exist

500.description: Internal server error

get.description: Fetches detailed information about the payment identified by the given paymentId.

example.message: Payment with the specified ID does not exist

500.description: Internal server error

post.description: Handles webhook notifications related to payment events, such as payment status updates.

requestBody.description: Details of the webhook notification event

500.description: Internal server error

post.description: Starts the payment process for an order, providing payment details and preferences.

500.description: Internal server error while initiating payment.

get.description: Fetches a list of all available products in the e-commerce platform.

500.description: Server error while retrieving products.

post.description: Adds a new product to the e-commerce platform with the provided details.

500.description: Server error while adding the product.

get.description: Fetches details of a specific product using its ID.

parameters.name: productId
parameters.description: ID of the product to retrieve

500.description: Server error while retrieving the product.

get.description: Searches for products based on various criteria such as category and price range.

parameters.name: minPrice
parameters.description: Minimum price filter for the products

parameters.name: maxPrice
parameters.description: Maximum price filter for the products

200.description: Products retrieved successfully based on search criteria.

500.description: Server error while searching for products.

post.summary: Place an order for a user
post.description: Submits an order for the specified user, processing the items in the user's cart.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User identifier for placing the order

400.description: Invalid user ID or request data.

500.description: Server error while placing the order.

get.description: Fetches details for a specific order using the order ID.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: ID of the order to retrieve

500.description: Server error while retrieving the order.

delete.description: Cancels a specific order using the order ID, if it is eligible for cancellation.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: ID of the order to cancel

400.description: Invalid order ID or cancellation request.

500.description: Server error while canceling the order.

get.description: Fetches a list of all orders placed by a specific user.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: User identifier to fetch orders for

500.description: Server error while retrieving user orders.

post.description: Adds a new shipping address for the user, to be used for order deliveries.

500.description: Server error while adding the address.

put.description: Update the details of an existing shipping address identified by its unique ID. This operation allows modification of address fields.

parameters.name: addressId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the address to be updated.

requestBody.description: The address details to be updated in the system.

404.description: Address not found with the provided ID.

500.description: An unexpected error occurred while updating the address.

get.description: Retrieve the current status and location information of a shipping order using its unique order ID.

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: The unique identifier for the order to be tracked.

404.description: Order not found with the provided ID.

500.description: An unexpected error occurred while retrieving the tracking information.

gatewayResponse.description: Response received from the payment gateway.

totalAmount.description: The total amount for the order before discounts.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the order was created.

totalDiscount.description: The total discount applied to the order.

currency.description: Currency code for the order amounts.

userId.description: Unique identifier for the user associated with the order.

items.description: List of items included in the order.

payableAmount.description: The amount to be paid after applying discounts.

paymentStatus.description: The current payment status of the order.

status.description: The current status of the order.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the order.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user was created.

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active.

userType.description: Type of user, e.g., admin or customer.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the user details.

quantity.description: Number of units for the product in the order.

price.description: Price of a single unit of the product.

discount.description: Discount on a single unit of the product.

finalPrice.description: Price after discount for a single unit of the product.

quantity.description: Number of units for the product in the cart.

price.description: Price of a single unit of the product before any discounts.

discount.description: Discount on a single unit of the product.

finalPrice.description: Price after discount for a single unit of the product.

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp of the last status update for the tracking.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order being tracked.

courierPartner.description: Name of the courier partner handling the delivery.

trackingId.description: Unique tracking identifier provided by the courier.

totalAmount.description: The total amount for all items in the cart before discounts.

totalDiscount.description: The total discount applied to the cart items.

currency.description: Currency code for the cart amounts.

userId.description: Unique identifier for the user associated with the cart.

items.description: List of items currently in the cart.

payableAmount.description: The total amount to be paid after applying discounts.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the cart.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the address was created.

phone.description: Contact phone number for the address.

addressType.description: Type of address, e.g., home or office.

state.description: State or region of the address.

userId.description: Unique identifier of the user associated with the address.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the address.

active.description: Indicates if the user account is active.

userType.description: Type of user, e.g., admin or customer.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the product was added to the catalog.

rating.description: Average user rating for the product.

available.description: Indicates if the product is available for purchase.

description.example: A state-of-the-art smartwatch with health tracking features.

currency.description: Currency code for the product's pricing.

stock.description: Current stock level of the product.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of the last update to the product details.

price.description: Price of the product to be set.

available.description: Whether the product is available for sale.

description.description: Description of the product features and specifications.
description.example: A lightweight fitness tracker for daily health monitoring.

category.description: Category under which the product is listed.

stock.description: Initial stock quantity of the product.

quantity.description: Updated number of units for the specified product.

productId.description: Unique identifier of the product to update in the cart.

operation.description: Operation to perform, such as 'add' or 'remove'.

amount.description: Total amount to be processed for payment.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order related to the payment.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method chosen by the user, e.g., credit card, PayPal.

currency.description: Currency code for the payment transaction.

paymentGateway.description: Name of the payment gateway being used.

pincode.description: Postal code for the new address.

phone.description: Contact number for the new address.

addressType.description: Type of address to be added, e.g., home or office.

name.description: Name associated with the new address.

state.description: State or region for the new address.

addressLine.description: Detailed address line for the new address.

userId.description: User ID associated with the address.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the payment record was created.

orderId.description: Unique identifier for the order related to the payment.

paymentMethod.description: Payment method used like credit card, PayPal.

status.description: Status of the payment, e.g., successful or failed.
